important_points: Oil prices fell on Thursday as investors weighed signs of progress in indirect negotiations between Washington and Tehran, easing concerns about potential disruptions to crude supplies in the Middle East.
U.S.
West Texas Intermediate crude futures fell 1.33% to $67.67 a barrel, while global benchmark Brent crude declined 1.12% to $70.77.

items.title: Where can I invest my kid’s ‘Trump account’ money? The Treasury Department just answered that question.

items.title: World Cup could boost the June jobs report by 40,000, Goldman estimates
items.title_zh: 世界杯可能提升6月就业数据40,000
items.summary: 金尔顿·沃克等分析师预测，世界杯带来的积极影响可能使6月就业数据增长40,000，低于5月的172,000增长。数据显示，6月招聘增速整体下滑，但11个主办城市增幅较大。机构指出，旅游、酒店和服务业表现强劲，整体经济增速仍有改善。
important_points: 世界杯可能提升招聘增长40,000个岗位
6月非农就业增长数据低于5月
旅游业和服务业表现突出
机构预测未来增速仍有提升空间

items.title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
items.title_zh: Warsh面临多重通胀信号，美联储调整路线
items.summary: 联邦储备委员会主席Kevin Warsh指出通胀是“选择”，表明测量方法也在变化。美联储正在评估新政策框架，关注数据触发点以优化货币政策。机构对未来通胀监测方式有更深入理解。
important_points: Warsh希望未来使用新技术实时分析经济变化
美联储设立五个任务组，关注不同测量指标
关注核心与周期性通胀差异，提升政策精准度

items.title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.title_zh: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：With oil and gas prices falling in the wake of the detente between the U.S.；and Iran, prediction market traders now think inflation has peaked.；Speculators on prediction market platform Kalshi think there's only a 28% chance that headline inflation this year climbs above 4.2%, the annual rate of increase in the Consumer Price Index in May.
important_points: With oil and gas prices falling in the wake of the detente between the U.S.
and Iran, prediction market traders now think inflation has peaked.
Speculators on prediction market platform Kalshi think there's only a 28% chance that headline inflation this year climbs above 4.2%, the annual rate of increase in the Consumer Price Index in May.

items.title: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
items.title_zh: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：The South Korean government has used its regulatory authority to discriminate against U.S.；companies and has waged an unprecedented campaign against online retailer Coupang, according to a House Judiciary Committee report released Wednesday.；The report is the result of an investigation opened by the committee in February.
important_points: The South Korean government has used its regulatory authority to discriminate against U.S.
companies and has waged an unprecedented campaign against online retailer Coupang, according to a House Judiciary Committee report released Wednesday.
The report is the result of an investigation opened by the committee in February.

items.title: U.S. auto industry faces increased uncertainty without extension of USMCA trade deal
items.title_zh: U.S. auto industry faces increased uncertainty without extension of USMCA trade deal
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：The U.S.；automotive industry is entering a new phase of uncertainty as the Trump administration said the USMCA trade agreement between the United States, Mexico and Canada will not be extended by Wednesday, triggering what could be a yearslong review process or an expiration of the pact if no deal is reached by 2036.；The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement, which replaced the North American Free Trade Agreement, was established during President Donald Trump's first term in 2020, but the administration has soured on the deal that governs roughly $2 trillion annually in goods and services between the three countries.
important_points: The U.S.

automotive industry is entering a new phase of uncertainty as the Trump administration said the USMCA trade agreement between the United States, Mexico and Canada will not be extended by Wednesday, triggering what could be a yearslong review process or an expiration of the pact if no deal is reached by 2036.

The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement, which replaced the North American Free Trade Agreement, was established during President Donald Trump's first term in 2020, but the administration has soured on the deal that governs roughly $2 trillion annually in goods and services between the three countries.

items.title: 沃什说服了特朗普先不降息？专访欧洲经济学家米霍夫‌
items.title_zh: 沃什说服了特朗普先不降息？专访欧洲经济学家米霍夫‌
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 美联储新主席沃什在上任前多次阐述降息的有利之处，且深受同样希望降息的美国总特朗普赏识。；“沃什曾提出一套论点，阐述为何降息并非坏事，反而有利；然而在首次会议上，他似乎又在这一立场上有所退缩。在我看来，这是一个非常重要的信号。”欧洲工商管理学院（INSEAD）前院长、现任劳辛经济与商业讲席教授伊利亚·米霍夫（Ilian Mihov）在接受第一财经记者专访时如此表示。；米霍夫熟稔美联储的货币政策和决策流程，在普林斯顿大学攻读博士学位时，曾是美联储前主席伯南克教授的研究助理，并曾同伯南克共同撰写学术论文。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 美联储新主席沃什在上任前多次阐述降息的有利之处，且深受同样希望降息的美国总特朗普赏识。
“沃什曾提出一套论点，阐述为何降息并非坏事，反而有利；然而在首次会议上，他似乎又在这一立场上有所退缩。在我看来，这是一个非常重要的信号。”欧洲工商管理学院（INSEAD）前院长、现任劳辛经济与商业讲席教授伊利亚·米霍夫（Ilian Mihov）在接受第一财经记者专访时如此表示。
米霍夫熟稔美联储的货币政策和决策流程，在普林斯顿大学攻读博士学位时，曾是美联储前主席伯南克教授的研究助理，并曾同伯南克共同撰写学术论文。
